# PERF-170 negative: use a sync/atomic.Bool for cheap one-time init
lang: go
file: PERF-170-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync/atomic"
)

var initialized atomic.Bool

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if !initialized.Load() {
		initialized.Store(true)
	}
	_ = r
	_ = w
}
